pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target properties to version 17 to align with the new JDK requirement.
Add Jakarta XML Binding (JAXB) dependencies to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Add Jakarta Persistence API dependencies to replace the javax.persistence package removed from the JDK.
Add Jakarta RESTful Web Services (JAX-RS) dependencies to replace the javax.ws.rs package.
Add Jakarta Bean Validation dependencies to replace the javax.validation package.
Add Jakarta WebSocket dependencies to replace the javax.websocket package.
Add Jakarta Expression Language dependencies required by newer Jakarta EE specs.

build/build.sh.general_idea: Removed build arguments for Bintray credentials as the artifact repository was migrated away from Bintray.

mvn.sh.general_idea: Switch the Maven Docker image from an OpenJ9 JDK 11 variant to an AdoptOpenJDK 16 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace the direct user ID mapping with PUID/PGID environment variables and run Maven as a specific container user to fix permission issues in the new image.
mvn.sh.human_impl: --env PUID=`id -u` -e PGID=`id -g` ... runuser --user user --group user -- mvn
